scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @echo/signaling" "npm run dev -w @echo/matching" "npm run dev -w @echo/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @echo/shared && npm run build -w @echo/signaling && npm run build -w @echo/matching && npm run build -w @echo/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @echo/shared && npm run typecheck -w @echo/signaling && npm run typecheck -w @echo/matching && npm run typecheck -w @echo/frontend
